description: Unified Claude Code Hooks System - Memento Architecture

recall.description: On-demand recall model (headless `claude -p`, user's Claude auth — no API key): recall_history queries, deep-retrospective, self-evolution. maxTokens is ADVISORY — forwarded via CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS; llm-call.mjs caps the prompt itself.

summarize.description: Per-compaction session summary (headless `claude -p`): the rolling-history punch list + diagnosis written by precompact-llm, and the threshold-gated distiller. maxTokens is ADVISORY (see recall).

retrospective.description: Deep-retrospective synthesis: reads the whole cross-session history and its output steers future work, so it runs on opus — never haiku. Was sonnet; moved to opus 2026-07-02 (sonnet billing bug burns usage).

formatting.comment: DISABLED: auto-format on every Write|Edit caused overhead (npx spawn per edit), surprise whole-file reformats (no repo .prettierrc, so prettier defaults fight the file's style), and stale-file churn. Run formatters manually instead. Flip to true only with a committed formatter config that matches the codebase.

linting.comment: Read-only lint of the edited file (CHECK mode, never --fix). Surfaces issues and nudges the agent to fix them — including pre-existing ones — while the file is open. Bounded to maxIssues lines / timeoutMs. Each linter runs ONLY when its config (`requires`) is present, so projects without that linter stay quiet and rely on the editor's native type diagnostics. eslint MUST use a single-line format (unix/compact) so output is parseable.

qualityGates.maxFileLinesComment: Anti-monolith soft ceiling: post-edit nudge (file-length.mjs) when a code file exceeds this many lines, once per file per session. 0 disables.

evolution.description: Self-evolution loop: lessons.jsonl -> aggregation -> LLM synthesis -> proposals -> user review. suggestRetroAfterCompactions: session-start suggests /retrospective once this many compactions accumulate since the last one (retro-cadence.mjs; 0 disables).

puntax.description: PUNTAX v2 settings. Per-subsystem env overrides: PUNTAX_CONTEXT_ROUTER, PUNTAX_EVENT_LEDGER, PUNTAX_PRECOMPACT_MODE, PUNTAX_CODE_MAP, PUNTAX_LLM_DISTILLATION. The permission layer (cf-approve) is intentionally untouched in v2; there is no permission governor block.

steeringBrief.description: Evolving mid-session orientation brief (steering-brief.mjs): every Nth compaction of a session, a detached worker synthesizes a <=30-line brief on opus (never haiku — this text is injected into context) and OVERWRITES the previous one; injected at SessionStart on compact/resume. Was sonnet; moved to opus 2026-07-02 (sonnet billing bug burns usage).
